mapper.select: SELECT own.id, own.user_id, usr.username, usr.real_name, own.skill_id, sk.skill_name, own.skill_version_id, ver.version_no, own.expert_level, own.status, own.grant_time FROM ai_skill_owner own INNER JOIN sys_user usr ON usr.id = own.user_id AND usr.is_deleted = FALSE INNER JOIN ai_skill sk ON sk.id = own.skill_id AND sk.is_deleted = FALSE INNER JOIN ai_skill_version ver ON ver.id = own.skill_version_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND own.user_id = #{request.userId} AND own.skill_id = #{request.skillId} AND own.status = #{request.status} ORDER BY own.grant_time DESC, own.id DESC
SELECT id, skill_id, skill_version_id, user_id, expert_level, status, grant_time FROM ai_skill_owner WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND skill_id = #{skillId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_skill_owner (skill_id, skill_version_id, user_id, expert_level, status, grant_time) VALUES (#{skillId}, #{skillVersionId}, #{userId}, #{expertLevel}, #{status}, #{grantTime})
